name: Tabs
searchText: tabs switch between different views @mantine/core /core/tabs activatetabwithkeyboard allowtabdeactivation autocontrast children color defaultvalue id inverted keepmounted keepmountedmode loop onchange orientation placement radius value children grow justify children color leftsection rightsection size value children keepmounted value

props.name: activateTabWithKeyboard
props.description: If set, tab is activated with arrow key press

props.name: allowTabDeactivation
props.description: If set, tab can be deactivated

props.name: autoContrast
props.description: If set, adjusts text color based on background color for pills variant

props.name: children
props.description: Tabs content

props.name: color
props.description: Changes colors of Tabs.Tab components when variant is pills or default, does nothing for other variants

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled component default value

props.name: id
props.description: Base id, used to generate ids to connect labels with controls, generated randomly by default

props.name: inverted
props.description: Determines whether tabs should have inverted styles

props.name: keepMounted
props.description: If set to false, Tabs.Panel content will be unmounted when the associated tab is not active

props.name: keepMountedMode
props.description: Controls how inactive tabs content is hidden when keepMounted is true, 'activity' – hidden with Activity component, 'display-none' – hidden with display: none styles

props.name: loop
props.description: If set, arrow key presses loop though items (first to last and last to first)

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called when value changes

props.name: orientation
props.description: Tabs orientation

props.name: placement
props.description: Tabs.List placement relative to Tabs.Panel, applicable only when orientation="vertical"

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled component value

props.name: children
props.description: Tabs.Tab components

props.name: grow
props.description: Determines whether tabs should take all available space

props.name: justify
props.description: Tabs alignment

props.name: children
props.description: Tab label

props.name: color
props.description: Key of theme.colors or any valid CSS color, controls tab color based on variant

props.name: leftSection
props.description: Content displayed on the left side of the label

props.name: rightSection
props.description: Content displayed on the right side of the label

props.name: size
props.description: Size passed from parent component, sets data-size if value is not number like

props.name: value
props.description: Value of associated panel

props.name: children
props.description: Panel content

props.name: keepMounted
props.description: If set, the content is kept mounted, even if keepMounted is set false in the parent Tabs component

props.name: value
props.description: Value of associated control
